items.title: Dubai wealth flight to safety: Here's what to know
items.description: The war in Iran is sparking a wealth flight from the UAE. CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with more.

items.title: The wealthy once rushed to Dubai. Now they're scrambling to leave
items.description: Since the start of the U.S.-Iran war, Dubai's status as a haven for the global elite has been shattered.

items.title: Luxury stocks slump as Middle East conflict risks one of the sector’s 'few bright spots’
items.description: The Middle East has been one of the few bright spots in a sector that is struggling to get sales back on track.

items.title: Rise of high net worth art loans: Here's what to know
items.description: The business of lending money to the wealthy against their art collection is becoming a booming industry. CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with ...

items.title: The blue wave of tax hikes: Here's what to know
items.description: Washington may be the next state to see the wealthy flee. CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.
